productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Beige Tshirts
description: Composition Light beige round neck t-shirt made of 70% modal and 30% polyester, with short sleeves, vented hem and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your spoilt-boy look with much elan in this light beige t-shirt from united colors of benetton. Team this tee with jeans and suede shoes for that uber cool look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
